title: I Made Bread Buddies
overview: On her first day of school, Minami Tani, a girl who is obsessed with bread, befriends her classmates Yuu Aizawa and Fuyumi Fukagawa.

title: This Is a Weapon
overview: Fuyumi introduces her friend, Noa Sakura, who looks and acts childlike despite being the same age.

title: Fuwa Fuyu Bakery
overview: The girls visit Fuyumi's family bakery, where they try some of their special breads before trying their hand at baking their own.

title: In Pursuit of the Fabled Bread
overview: The girls go to the school store to try and obtain a limited ciabatta sandwich.

title: Yuu-chan's Dream
overview: Yuu talks about her dreams of becoming a manga artist.

title: Fuyumi-chan's Diet
overview: The girls try to help Fuyumi lose weight by making miniature melon pan.

title: The Sick Noa-chan!
overview: The girls visit Noa, who is sick with a cold, and meet her little sister Ami.

title: The New Bakery
overview: Noa visits the Guillame French bakery, where she befriends a girl named Mai Kawai, prompting some jealousy from Fuyumi.

title: The Cultural Festival
overview: The girls hold a maid café at their school's culture festival, where Mai pays a visit.

title: Intriguing Girl
overview: Mai visits the FuwaFuyu bakery, where she and Fuyumi find some common interests.

title: Let's Swim
overview: The girls go to the pool to teach Noa and Yuu how to swim, unaware that Mai can't swim either.

title: Slumber Party at the Vacation Home
overview: The girls are invited to stay over at Mai's vacation home.

title: Pan de Peace!
overview: The girls recall all the memories they made thanks to their love of bread.
